name: Hummus
recipeInstructions:
1. GARNISH: lemon wedges, cherry tomatoes, or fresh parsley sprigs (optional)
2. In a small skillet, heat oil; sauté onion and garlic until the onion is softened.
3. Add seasonings. Stir just long enough to soften parsley.
4. In a food processor, combine rinsed and drained chick peas and lemon juice; process until smooth.
5. Stir in onion and herb mixture; stir in sesame seeds.
6. Spoon into serving bowl. Top with garnish if desired.
VARIATIONS:
1. Substitute 15-oz can Great Northern beans for chickpeas. Use only 2 tbsp lemon juice, since this is a moister bean.
2. Replace chick peas with 1/2 lb firm tofu (1 cup) and 1/2 cup tahini; use only 1 tbsp lemon juice and add 1 tbsp soy sauce.
